entity.summary: Crypto-asset derivatives and spot trading platform originally known as JEX and later operated as Binance JEX after Binance acquired it in September 2019. JEX offered futures, options, perpetual contracts, and spot trading. In October 2021, JEX announced that, under latest regulatory requirements, new mainland China registrations and KYC had stopped and the platform would officially cease operations on 2021-12-01. Cryptowisser later marked Binance JEX dead and moved it to the Exchange Graveyard.
entity.notes: HEI uses death_reason regulation because the JEX suspension notice explicitly cites latest regulatory requirements and Cryptowisser attributes closure to regulatory pressure from Chinese authorities. country_or_origin follows CoinDesk/Nasdaq reporting that JEX was Seychelles-registered.

events.title: Binance acquired JEX
events.description: Binance acquired the JEX spot and derivatives trading platform and renamed it Binance JEX.
events.notes: Contemporary reporting dated September 2-4, 2019 records the acquisition and renaming.

events.title: Binance JEX officially ceased operations
events.description: After closing new mainland-China registrations, deposits, spot trading, and futures trading in stages, Binance JEX officially ceased operations on December 1, 2021.
events.notes: The official notice was issued on 2021-10-25. Users retained withdrawal access after the platform ceased trading operations.

evidence.title: Binance Acquires Crypto Exchange JEX to Boost Derivatives Offerings
evidence.notes: Contemporary report documenting Binance's acquisition of JEX and its spot/derivatives business.

evidence.title: Binance acquires JEX and enters crypto derivatives market
evidence.notes: Independent contemporary coverage corroborating the acquisition and Binance JEX identity.

evidence.title: Announcement on the suspension of operation of the JEX platform
evidence.notes: First-party notice sets the November 21 trading closures and December 1 official cessation date and attributes the exit to regulatory requirements.

evidence.title: Binance JEX exchange closure profile
evidence.notes: Exchange-directory profile preserves the December 1, 2021 cessation date and the official wind-down wording.
